spec_match.rationale: The simulator now teaches the correct Chrome 137 direction: the affected cross-origin iframe without activation path changes from SecurityError to NotAllowedError, while other paths remain NotAllowedError or success.

interactive.rationale: Scenario selection, run/reset buttons, clickable step rows, status badges, detail panels, and a generated comparison grid all update live without relying on static code cards.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The concept lede and feature-index blurb now both describe the same narrow SPC/WebAuthn compat path and no longer imply unrelated RP-origin or permissions-policy paths changed.

edge_cases.rationale: Unaffected same-origin no-activation, cross-origin with activation, user-dismissal, and success outcomes are explicitly modeled so the rename is not overgeneralized.

references.rationale: The page now includes ChromeStatus feature 5160752715137024, the Secure Payment Confirmation PR #281, and the WebAuthn createCredential algorithm link.

design_system.rationale: Inline styles and tick/cross glyphs were removed; the page uses design-system variables, explicit button colors, stable grids, and inline SVG status icons.

summary: Credential Flow Simulator now matches the SPC/WebAuthn error-type change, keeps unaffected paths separate, includes references, and has no remaining critique tasks.
